spec_match.rationale: The diagram, table, sample code, and live probe now reflect processLocally, local language-pack availability, install(), and cloud fallback behavior.

interactive.rationale: The live panel checks SpeechRecognition/webkitSpeechRecognition, processLocally, available()/install(), selected language-pack status, and working architecture highlight controls.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent blurb perfectly, outlining a detailed comparison of cloud vs local data paths.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles missing constructors, missing processLocally, missing static pack APIs, policy-check failures, unavailable/downloadable/downloading packs, and online/offline fallback messaging.

references.rationale: Correctly includes the ChromeStatus feature link in the see also list.

design_system.rationale: Uses showcase CSS variables, keeps the probe readable, and sets button foregrounds whenever local button backgrounds are overridden.

summary: The copy-pasted generic probe was replaced with a real On-device Web Speech checker and the previously inert comparison toggle became working architecture path controls.
